comment.body:
It is very interesting. This market is heavily hedged with puts by hedgies. What are they expecting? Inflation is not rebounding. Hedgies have degrossed. If we don’t get a surprise with Iran, then what else? I’m thinking these puts could add fuel to a rally into growth where hedgies are chasing. 

If NVDA blows-out earnings, there could be a continuation of today where IWM underperforms in relation to QQQ. We shall see.

If NVDA blows-out earnings, there could be a continuation of today where IWM underperforms in relation to QQQ. We shall see.
